subcodes.first_line: O Loving One! In the beginning, David did not shine forth in the eyes of men, nor was his grandeur and majesty evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ودود حضرت داود در بدایت در انظار جلوه نداشت و فر و شکوهی از او مشهود نبود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
